	        } else {                                                \
	            addr += addrLittle;                                 \
	        }                                                       \
	    }                                                           \
	}                                                               \
    }                                                                   \
no_draw:;                                                               \
}

// multimedia\opengl\server\generic\genspan.c
#define ZBUF_PROC(type, pass_cond) \
GLboolean FASTCALL __fastGenDepthTestSpan##type(__GLcontext *gc)\
{\
    register GLuint zAccum = gc->polygon.shader.frag.z;\
    register GLint zDelta = gc->polygon.shader.dzdx;\
    register GLuint *zbuf = gc->polygon.shader.zbuf;\
    register GLuint *pStipple = gc->polygon.shader.stipplePat;\
    register GLint cTotalPix = gc->polygon.shader.length;\
    register GLuint mask;\
    register GLint cPix;\
    register GLint zPasses = 0;\
    register GLuint maskBit;\
\
    for (;cTotalPix > 0; cTotalPix-=32) {\
        mask = 0;\
        maskBit = 0x80000000;\
        cPix = cTotalPix;\
        if (cPix > 32)\
            cPix = 32;\
\
        for (;cPix > 0; cPix --) {\
            if ((zAccum) pass_cond (*zbuf)) {\
                *zbuf = zAccum;\
                zPasses++;\
                mask |= maskBit;\
            }\
            *zbuf++;\
            zAccum += zDelta;\
            maskBit >>= 1;\
        }\
\
        *pStipple++ = mask;\
    }\
\
    if (zPasses == 0) {\
        gc->polygon.shader.done = TRUE;\
        return 1;\
    } else if (zPasses == gc->polygon.shader.length) {\
        return 0;\
    } else {\
        return 2;\
    }\
}
#define ZBUF16_PROC(type, pass_cond) \
GLboolean FASTCALL __fastGenDepth16TestSpan##type(__GLcontext *gc)\
{\
    register GLuint zAccum = gc->polygon.shader.frag.z;\
    register __GLz16Value z16Accum = (__GLz16Value) (zAccum >> Z16_SHIFT); \
    register GLint zDelta = gc->polygon.shader.dzdx;\
    register __GLz16Value *zbuf = (__GLz16Value *) (gc->polygon.shader.zbuf);\
    register GLuint *pStipple = gc->polygon.shader.stipplePat;\
    register GLint cTotalPix = gc->polygon.shader.length;\
    register GLuint mask;\
    register GLint cPix;\
    register GLint zPasses = 0;\
    register GLuint maskBit;\
\
    for (;cTotalPix > 0; cTotalPix-=32) {\
        mask = 0;\
        maskBit = 0x80000000;\
        cPix = cTotalPix;\
        if (cPix > 32)\
            cPix = 32;\
        \
        for (;cPix > 0; cPix --) {\
            if (((__GLz16Value)(zAccum >> Z16_SHIFT)) pass_cond (*zbuf)) {\
                *zbuf = ((__GLz16Value)(zAccum >> Z16_SHIFT));\
                zPasses++;\
                mask |= maskBit;\
            }\
            *zbuf++;\
            zAccum += zDelta;\
            maskBit >>= 1;\
        }\
\
        *pStipple++ = mask;\
    }\
\
    if (zPasses == 0) {\
        gc->polygon.shader.done = TRUE;\
        return 1;\
    } else if (zPasses == gc->polygon.shader.length) {\
        return 0;\
    } else {\
        return 2;\
    }\
}

// multimedia\opengl\server\inc\context.h
#define GC_TEMP_BUFFER_EXIT_CLEANUP(gc)                                 \
        {                                                               \
            int _i;                                                     \
            for (_i = 0; _i < sizeof(gc->apvTempBuf)/sizeof(void *); _i++)\
            {                                                           \
                if (gc->apvTempBuf[_i])                                 \
                {                                                       \
                    WARNING("Abnormal process exit: free allocated buffers\n");\
                    gcTempFree(gc, gc->apvTempBuf[_i]);              \
                    gc->apvTempBuf[_i] = (void *) NULL;                 \
                }                                                       \
            }                                                           \
        }

// multimedia\opengl\server\inc\global.h
#define __GL_SETUP_NOT_IN_BEGIN()	    \
    __GL_SETUP();			    \
    if (__GL_IN_BEGIN()) {		    \
	__glSetError(GL_INVALID_OPERATION); \
	return;				    \
    }
#define __GL_SETUP_NOT_IN_BEGIN_VALIDATE()	\
    __GL_SETUP();				\
    __GLbeginMode beginMode = gc->beginMode;	\
    if (beginMode != __GL_NOT_IN_BEGIN) {	\
	if (beginMode == __GL_NEED_VALIDATE) {	\
	    (*gc->procs.validate)(gc);		\
	    gc->beginMode = __GL_NOT_IN_BEGIN;	\
	} else {				\
	    __glSetError(GL_INVALID_OPERATION);	\
	    return;				\
	}					\
    }
#define __GL_SETUP_NOT_IN_BEGIN2()	    \
    __GL_SETUP();			    \
    if (__GL_IN_BEGIN()) {		    \
	__glSetError(GL_INVALID_OPERATION); \
	return 0;			    \
    }

// multimedia\opengl\server\soft\so_phong.c
#define SORT_AND_CULL_FACE(a, b, c, face, ccw)\
                                                                            \
    /*                                                                      \
    ** Sort vertices in y.  Keep track if a reversal of the winding         \
    ** occurs in direction (0 means no reversal, 1 means reversal).         \
    ** Save old vertex pointers in case we end up not doing a fill.         \
    */                                                                      \
    reversed = 0;                                                           \
    if (__GL_VERTEX_COMPARE(a->window.y, <, b->window.y)) {                 \
        if (__GL_VERTEX_COMPARE(b->window.y, <, c->window.y)) {             \
            /* Already sorted */                                            \
        } else {                                                            \
            if (__GL_VERTEX_COMPARE(a->window.y, <, c->window.y)) {         \
                temp=b; b=c; c=temp;                                        \
                reversed = 1;                                               \
            } else {                                                        \
                temp=a; a=c; c=b; b=temp;                                   \
            }                                                               \
        }                                                                   \
    } else {                                                                \
        if (__GL_VERTEX_COMPARE(b->window.y, <, c->window.y)) {             \
            if (__GL_VERTEX_COMPARE(a->window.y, <, c->window.y)) {         \
                temp=a; a=b; b=temp;                                        \
                reversed = 1;                                               \
            } else {                                                        \
                temp=a; a=b; b=c; c=temp;                                   \
            }                                                               \
        } else {                                                            \
            temp=a; a=c; c=temp;                                            \
            reversed = 1;                                                   \
        }                                                                   \
    }                                                                       \
                                                                            \
    GET_HALF_AREA(gc, a, b, c);                                             \
    ccw = !__GL_FLOAT_LTZ(gc->polygon.shader.area);                         \
                                                                            \
    /*                                                                      \
    ** Figure out if face is culled or not.  The face check needs to be     \
    ** based on the vertex winding before sorting.  This code uses the      \
    ** reversed flag to invert the sense of ccw - an xor accomplishes       \
    ** this conversion without an if test.                                  \
    **                                                                      \
    **      ccw reversed        xor                                         \
    **      --- --------        ---                                         \
    **      0   0           0 (remain !ccw)                                 \
    **      1   0           1 (remain ccw)                                  \
    **      0   1           1 (become ccw)                                  \
    **      1   1           0 (become cw)                                   \
    */                                                                      \
    face = gc->polygon.face[ccw ^ reversed];                                \
    if (face == gc->polygon.cullFace) {                                     \
    /* Culled */                                                            \
    return;                                                                 \
    }                                                                       \
                                                                            \
    STORE_AREA_PARAMS;

// multimedia\opengl\server\soft\so_polym.c
#define SORT_AND_CULL_FACE(a, b, c, face, ccw)\
                                                                            \
    /*                                                                      \
    ** Sort vertices in y.  Keep track if a reversal of the winding         \
    ** occurs in direction (0 means no reversal, 1 means reversal).         \
    ** Save old vertex pointers in case we end up not doing a fill.         \
    */                                                                      \
    reversed = 0;                                                           \
    if (__GL_VERTEX_COMPARE(a->window.y, <, b->window.y)) {                 \
        if (__GL_VERTEX_COMPARE(b->window.y, <, c->window.y)) {             \
            /* Already sorted */                                            \
        } else {                                                            \
            if (__GL_VERTEX_COMPARE(a->window.y, <, c->window.y)) {         \
                temp=b; b=c; c=temp;                                        \
                reversed = 1;                                               \
            } else {                                                        \
                temp=a; a=c; c=b; b=temp;                                   \
            }                                                               \
        }                                                                   \
    } else {                                                                \
        if (__GL_VERTEX_COMPARE(b->window.y, <, c->window.y)) {             \
            if (__GL_VERTEX_COMPARE(a->window.y, <, c->window.y)) {         \
                temp=a; a=b; b=temp;                                        \
                reversed = 1;                                               \
            } else {                                                        \
                temp=a; a=b; b=c; c=temp;                                   \
            }                                                               \
        } else {                                                            \
            temp=a; a=c; c=temp;                                            \
            reversed = 1;                                                   \
        }                                                                   \
    }                                                                       \
                                                                            \
    GET_HALF_AREA(gc, a, b, c);                                             \
    ccw = !__GL_FLOAT_LTZ(gc->polygon.shader.area);                         \
                                                                            \
    /*                                                                      \
    ** Figure out if face is culled or not.  The face check needs to be     \
    ** based on the vertex winding before sorting.  This code uses the      \
    ** reversed flag to invert the sense of ccw - an xor accomplishes       \
    ** this conversion without an if test.                                  \
    **                                                                      \
    **      ccw reversed        xor                                         \
    **      --- --------        ---                                         \
    **      0   0           0 (remain !ccw)                                 \
    **      1   0           1 (remain ccw)                                  \
    **      0   1           1 (become ccw)                                  \
    **      1   1           0 (become cw)                                   \
    */                                                                      \
    face = gc->polygon.face[ccw ^ reversed];                                \
    if (face == gc->polygon.cullFace) {                                     \
    /* Culled */                                                            \
    return;                                                                 \
    }                                                                       \
                                                                            \
    STORE_AREA_PARAMS;

// multimedia\opengl\test\conform\conform\copypix.c
#define FREE_AND_RETURN(err) {			\
    glPixelStorei(GL_UNPACK_ROW_LENGTH, 0);	\
    FREE(refBuf); 				\
    FREE(buf);					\
    FREE(drawBuf);				\
    return(err);				\
}

// multimedia\opengl\test\conform\conform\dlist.c
#define CLEANUP_AND_RETURN(err) {                     \
    glPixelMapfv(GL_PIXEL_MAP_I_TO_R, 1, mapReset);   \
    glPixelMapfv(GL_PIXEL_MAP_I_TO_G, 1, mapReset);   \
    glPixelMapfv(GL_PIXEL_MAP_I_TO_B, 1, mapReset);   \
    glDeleteLists(firstList, 3);                      \
    FREE(buf);                                        \
    return(err);                                      \
}

// multimedia\opengl\test\conform\conform\drawpix.c
#define FREE_AND_RETURN(err) {			    \
    glPixelStorei(GL_UNPACK_ALIGNMENT, 4);	    \
    glPixelStorei(GL_UNPACK_ROW_LENGTH, 0);	    \
    glPixelMapfv(GL_PIXEL_MAP_I_TO_R, 1, resetMap); \
    glPixelMapfv(GL_PIXEL_MAP_I_TO_G, 1, resetMap); \
    glPixelMapfv(GL_PIXEL_MAP_I_TO_B, 1, resetMap); \
    glPixelMapfv(GL_PIXEL_MAP_I_TO_A, 1, resetMap); \
    FREE(dataBuf);			   	    \
    FREE(convertBuf);				    \
    FREE(buf);					    \
    return(err);				    \
}

// multimedia\opengl\test\gldd\lib\ddwin.cxx
#define WIN32_HR() ((HRESULT)GetLastError())

// multimedia\opengl\test\simple\rgb\d3dapp\d3dmacs.h
#define MAKE_MATRIX(lpDev, handle, data) \
    if (lpDev->CreateMatrix(&handle) != D3D_OK) \
	return FALSE; \
    if (lpDev->SetMatrix(handle, &data) != D3D_OK) \
	return FALSE
#define RELEASE(x) if (x != NULL) {x->Release(); x = NULL;}
#define OP_SET_STATUS(flags, status, _x1, _y1, _x2, _y2, ptr) \
    PUTD3DINSTRUCTION(D3DOP_SETSTATUS, sizeof(D3DSTATUS), 1, ptr); \
    ((LPD3DSTATUS)(ptr))->dwFlags = flags; \
    ((LPD3DSTATUS)(ptr))->dwStatus = status; \
    ((LPD3DSTATUS)(ptr))->drExtent.x1 = _x1; \
    ((LPD3DSTATUS)(ptr))->drExtent.y1 = _y1; \
    ((LPD3DSTATUS)(ptr))->drExtent.x2 = _x2; \
    ((LPD3DSTATUS)(ptr))->drExtent.y2 = _y2; \
    ptr = (void *)(((LPD3DSTATUS) (ptr)) + 1)

// multimedia\opengl\test\simple\rgb\d3dapp\rmdemo.h
#define RELEASE(x) if (x != NULL) {x->Release(); x = NULL;}

// multimedia\opengl\test\simple\rgb\gfxperf\rend.h
#define MAKE_REND_MATRIX(prwin, prm, dm) \
    if (((prm) = (prwin)->NewMatrix()) == NULL) \
    { \
        return FALSE; \
    } \
    else \
    { \
        (prm)->Set(&(dm)); \
    }

// multimedia\published\directx\dmusic\inc\dmerror.h
#define MAKE_HRESULT(sev,fac,code) \
    ((HRESULT) (((unsigned long)(sev)<<31) | ((unsigned long)(fac)<<16) | ((unsigned long)(code))) )
#define MAKE_DMHRESULTSUCCESS(code)     MAKE_HRESULT(0, FACILITY_DIRECTMUSIC, (DMUS_ERRBASE + (code)))
#define MAKE_DMHRESULTERROR(code)       MAKE_HRESULT(1, FACILITY_DIRECTMUSIC, (DMUS_ERRBASE + (code)))

#define DAERR_VIEW_SURFACE_BUSY         DA_MAKE_HRESULT(12)
#define DAERR_DXTRANSFORM_UNSUPPORTED_OPERATION               DA_MAKE_HRESULT(20)

// multimedia\published\wmsdk\inc\asferr.h
#define STATUS_SEVERITY(hr)  (((hr) >> 30) & 0x3)

// multimedia\published\wmsdk\inc\nserror.h
#define STATUS_SEVERITY(hr)  (((hr) >> 30) & 0x3)

// multimedia\reality\misc\lists.h
#define	CIRCLE_QUEUE_DELETE(root,element,field)\
{   if((element)->field.Next != (void *)(root))\
	(element)->field.Next->field.Prev = (element)->field.Prev;\
    else\
	(root)->Last = (element)->field.Prev;\
    if((element)->field.Prev != (void *)(root))\
	(element)->field.Prev->field.Next = (element)->field.Next;\
    else\
	(root)->First = (element)->field.Next;\
    (element)->field.Next = 0;\
    (element)->field.Prev = 0;\
}

// net\1394\arp\kdext\rmtest.h
#define NdisFreeMemory(_p, _x, _y)			LocalFree(_p)
#define	NdisFreeSpinLock(_plock)		DeleteCriticalSection(_plock)
#define NdisFreeBuffer(buf)			LocalFree(buf)

// net\1394\arp\sys\priv.h
#define ARP_FASTUNLOCK_IF_SEND_LOCK(_pIF) \
        NdisReleaseSpinLock(&(_pIF)->sendinfo.Lock.OsLock)
#define ARP_FREE(_p)            NdisFreeMemory((_p), 0, 0)

// net\1394\nic\sys\priv.h
#define FREE_NDIS_WORK_ITEM( pA, pNwi ) \
    NdisFreeToNPagedLookasideList( &(pA)->llistWorkItems, (pNwi) )
#define FREE_TIMERQITEM( pA, pTqi ) \
    NdisFreeToNPagedLookasideList( &(pA)->llistTimerQItems, (pTqi) )
#define VC_ACTIVE(_V)                       (((_V)->Hdr.ulFlags & (VCBF_CloseCallPending | VCBF_VcDeleted | VCBF_VcActivated |VCBF_MakeCallPending )) == VCBF_VcActivated)
#define REASSEMBLY_ACTIVE(_R)               (((_R)->Flags & (REASSEMBLY_ABORTED | REASSEMBLY_FREED)) == 0)
#define nicCloseCallRef(_pV)                nicCloseRef (&(_pV)->Hdr.CallRef);
#define VC_RELEASE_LOCK(_pVc)               NdisReleaseSpinLock (_pVc->Hdr.plock);
#define AF_RELEASE_LOCK(_pAF)               NdisReleaseSpinLock (&_pAF->pAdapter->lock);
#define ADAPTER_RELEASE_LOCK(_pA)           NdisReleaseSpinLock (&_pA->lock);
#define REMOTE_NODE_RELEASE_LOCK(_pP)       NdisReleaseSpinLock (&_pP->pAdapter->lock);
#define REMOTE_NODE_REASSEMBLY_RELEASE_LOCK(_Remote)        NdisReleaseSpinLock (&_Remote->ReassemblyLock.NdisLock);
#define nicDecChannelSendMdl()     NdisInterlockedIncrement(&MdlsFreed[ChannelCodePath]);
#define nicDecFifoSendMdl()         NdisInterlockedIncrement(&MdlsFreed[FifoCodePath]);
#define nicDecChannelRecvBuffer()     NdisInterlockedIncrement(&NdisBufferFreed[ChannelCodePath]);
#define nicDecFifoRecvBuffer()         NdisInterlockedIncrement(&NdisBufferFreed[FifoCodePath]);
#define nicFreeMdlRecordStat()

// net\atm\arp\atmarpc\arpwmi.c
#define	AA_WMI_BUFFER_TOO_SMALL(_BufferSize, _Wnode, _WnodeSize, _pStatus)		\
{																				\
	if ((_BufferSize) < sizeof(WNODE_TOO_SMALL))								\
	{																			\
		*(_pStatus) = STATUS_BUFFER_TOO_SMALL;									\
	}																			\
	else																		\
	{																			\
		(_Wnode)->WnodeHeader.BufferSize = sizeof(WNODE_TOO_SMALL);				\
		(_Wnode)->WnodeHeader.Flags |= WNODE_FLAG_TOO_SMALL;					\
		((PWNODE_TOO_SMALL)(_Wnode))->SizeNeeded = (_WnodeSize);				\
																				\
		*(_pStatus) = STATUS_SUCCESS;											\
	}																			\
}

// net\atm\arp\atmarpc\cmddk.h
#define KeReleaseSpinLockFromDpcLevel(a)    KefReleaseSpinLockFromDpcLevel(a)
#define KeReleaseSpinLock(a,b)  KfReleaseSpinLock(a,b)
#define KeReleaseSpinLock(a,b)  KfReleaseSpinLock(a,b)
#define ExReleaseSpinLock(Lock, OldIrql) KeLowerIrql((OldIrql))
#define ExReleaseSpinLock(Lock, OldIrql) KeReleaseSpinLock((Lock), (OldIrql))
#define ExReleaseSpinLockFromDpcLevel(Lock)
#define ExReleaseSpinLock(Lock, OldIrql) KeReleaseSpinLock((Lock), (OldIrql))
#define ExReleaseSpinLockFromDpcLevel(Lock) KeReleaseSpinLockFromDpcLevel(Lock)
#define ExReleaseSpinLock(Lock, OldIrql) KeLowerIrql((OldIrql))
#define ExReleaseSpinLockFromDpcLevel(Lock)
#define ExReleaseSpinLock(Lock, OldIrql) KeReleaseSpinLock((Lock), (OldIrql))
#define ExReleaseSpinLockFromDpcLevel(Lock) KeReleaseSpinLockFromDpcLevel(Lock)

#define AA_IS_VC_GOING_DOWN(_pVc)		\
				(((_pVc)->Flags & (AA_VC_CLOSE_STATE_CLOSING|AA_VC_CALL_STATE_CLOSE_IN_PROGRESS)) != 0)

#define AA_FREE_MEM(pMem)	NdisFreeMemory((PVOID)(pMem), 0, 0);
#define AA_IS_TRANSIENT_FAILURE(_Status)	\
			((_Status == NDIS_STATUS_RESOURCES) ||					\
			 (_Status == NDIS_STATUS_CELLRATE_NOT_AVAILABLE) ||		\
			 (_Status == NDIS_STATUS_INCOMPATABLE_QOS))

// net\atm\arp\atmarpc\system.h
#define AA_COMPLETE_IRP(_pIrp, _Status, _Length)				\
			{													\
				(_pIrp)->IoStatus.Status = (_Status);			\
				(_pIrp)->IoStatus.Information = (_Length);		\
				IoCompleteRequest((_pIrp), IO_NO_INCREMENT);	\
			}

// net\atm\arp\atmarps\intf.h
#define	CLEANUP_DEAD_VC(_ArpEntry)														\
	{																					\
		if (((_ArpEntry)->Vc != NULL) && (((_ArpEntry)->Vc->Flags & ARPVC_ACTIVE) == 0))\
		{																				\
			PARP_VC	Vc = (_ArpEntry)->Vc;												\
																						\
			ArpSDereferenceVc(Vc, TRUE, FALSE);											\
			(_ArpEntry)->Vc = NULL;														\
		}																				\
	}

// net\atm\arp\atmarps\mars.c
#define MARS_CO_SEND_PACKETS(_Vc, _PktArray, _PktCount)							\
{																				\
	ULONG			_Count;														\
	NDIS_HANDLE		_NdisVcHandle = (_Vc)->NdisVcHandle;						\
																				\
	if (_NdisVcHandle != NULL)													\
	{																			\
		NdisCoSendPackets(_NdisVcHandle, _PktArray, _PktCount);					\
	}																			\
	else																		\
	{																			\
		for (_Count = 0; _Count < _PktCount; _Count++)							\
		{																		\
			ArpSCoSendComplete(NDIS_STATUS_FAILURE, _Vc, _PktArray[_Count]);	\
		}																		\
	}																			\
}

// net\atm\rawwan\sys\ntentry.c
#define RWAN_COMPLETE_IRP(_pIrp, _Status, _Info)						\
			{														\
				(_pIrp)->IoStatus.Status = (NTSTATUS)(_Status);		\
				(_pIrp)->IoStatus.Information = (_Info);			\
				IoCompleteRequest(_pIrp, IO_NETWORK_INCREMENT);		\
			}

			(NdisWaitEvent(&((pEvent)->Event), 0), (pEvent)->Status)

#define     FreeArray2(X)          Error = MemArrayCleanup((X)); Require(ERROR_SUCCESS == Error);

#define     FreeArray2(X)          Error = MemArrayCleanup((X)); Require(ERROR_SUCCESS == Error);
#define     FreeArray(X)           do{ DWORD Error; FreeArray1(X); FreeArray2(X); }while(0)

// net\diagnostics\netdiag\netdiag.h
#define CheckHr(x) \
	if ((hr = (x)) & (0x80000000)) \
	   goto Error;
#define CheckErr(x) \
	if ((hr = HResultFromWin32(x)) & (0x80000000)) \
		goto Error;
#define FHrFailed(hr)		FAILED(hr)
#define CHK_HR_CONTEXT(w, h, IDS){	\
	if (FAILED(h))	{\
	(w).hr = (h), (w).idsContext = (IDS); goto L_ERR;}}

#define xfree(p)   HeapFree (GetProcessHeap(),0,(p))

// net\dlc\api\acslan.c
#define CopyToDescriptorBuffer(pDescriptors,                                                \
                               pDlcBufferQueue,                                             \
                               DeallocateBufferAfterUse,                                    \
                               pIndex,                                                      \
                               ppBuffer,                                                    \
                               pDlcStatus                                                   \
                               )                                                            \
{                                                                                           \
    (*ppBuffer) = pDlcBufferQueue;                                                          \
    (*pDlcStatus) = LLC_STATUS_SUCCESS;                                                     \
                                                                                            \
    while ((*ppBuffer) != NULL) {                                                           \
                                                                                            \
        if (*pIndex >= MAX_TRANSMIT_SEGMENTS) {                                             \
            (*pDlcStatus) = LLC_STATUS_TRANSMIT_ERROR;                                      \
            break;                                                                          \
        }                                                                                   \
                                                                                            \
        pDescriptors[*pIndex].pBuffer = &((*ppBuffer)->auchData[(*ppBuffer)->cbUserData]);  \
        pDescriptors[*pIndex].cbBuffer = (*ppBuffer)->cbBuffer;                             \
        pDescriptors[*pIndex].eSegmentType = LLC_NEXT_DATA_SEGMENT;                         \
        pDescriptors[*pIndex].boolFreeBuffer = DeallocateBufferAfterUse;                    \
                                                                                            \
        if (DeallocateBufferAfterUse) {                                                     \
                                                                                            \
            PLLC_XMIT_BUFFER pTempNext;                                                     \
                                                                                            \
            pTempNext = (*ppBuffer)->pNext;                                                 \
            (*ppBuffer)->pNext = NULL;                                                      \
            (*ppBuffer) = pTempNext;                                                        \
        } else {                                                                            \
            (*ppBuffer) = (*ppBuffer)->pNext;                                               \
        }                                                                                   \
        (*pIndex)++;                                                                        \
    }                                                                                       \
}

// net\dlc\driver\dlcbuf.c
#define UNLOCK_BUFFER_POOL()    KeReleaseSpinLock(&pBufferPool->SpinLock, irql)
#define CHECK_FREE_SEGMENT_COUNT(pBuffer) CheckFreeSegmentCount(pBuffer)

// net\dlc\driver\dlcdef.h
#define NDIS_RING_STATUS_TO_DLC_RING_STATUS(status) ((status)>>1)
#define DLC_RING_STATUS_TO_NDIS_RING_STATUS(status) ((status)<<1)
#define IS_NDIS_RING_STATUS(status) (((status)&NDIS_RING_STATUS_MASK)!=0)
#define IS_DLC_RING_STATUS(status) (((status)&DLC_RING_STATUS_MASK)!=0)
#define LEAVE_DLC(p)    RELEASE_SPIN_LOCK(&p->SpinLock)
#define RELEASE_DLC_LOCK(i) KeReleaseSpinLock(&DlcSpinLock, (i))
#define BufferPoolCount(hBufferPool) \
    (((PDLC_BUFFER_POOL)hBufferPool)->FreeSpace >= (256L * 0x0000ffffL) ? \
        0xffff : \
        (((PDLC_BUFFER_POOL)hBufferPool)->FreeSpace / 256))
#define BufferPoolCheckThresholds( pBufferPool ) \
    (((pBufferPool) != NULL && \
      (((PDLC_BUFFER_POOL)(pBufferPool))->UncommittedSpace < 0 || \
       ((PDLC_BUFFER_POOL)(pBufferPool))->MissingSize > 0) && \
      ((PDLC_BUFFER_POOL)(pBufferPool))->BufferPoolSize < \
      ((PDLC_BUFFER_POOL)(pBufferPool))->MaxBufferSize && \
     MemoryLockFailed == FALSE) ? TRUE : FALSE)

    ReleaseComponentReference(c)

// net\homenet\alg\alg_icq\list.h
#define FreeList(ListHead, FreeFunction)                        \
{                                                               \
    PLIST_ENTRY _EX_Head;                                       \
    while (!IsListEmpty(ListHead))                              \
    {                                                           \
        _EX_Head = RemoveHeadList(ListHead);                    \
        (*(FreeFunction))(_EX_Head);                            \
    }                                                           \
}
#define FreeQueue(QueueHead, FreeFunction)                      \
    FreeList(QueueHead, FreeFunction)
#define FreeStack(StackHead, FreeFunction)                      \
    FreeList(StackHead, FreeFunction)

// net\homenet\alg\alg_icq\listc.h
#define CLEAN_NODE(_X_)   \
	(_X_)->AcquireLock(); \
	(_X_)->Nextp = NULL;  \
	(_X_)->Prevp = NULL;  \
	(_X_)->ReleaseLock()
#define FreeQueue(FreeFunction)                    \
		FreeList(FreeFunction)
#define FreeStack(FreeFunction)                      \
		FreeList(FreeFunction)

// net\homenet\alg\alg_icq\nathlpp.h
#define RELEASE_LOCK(x)         LeaveCriticalSection(&(x)->Lock)
#define REFERENCE_OBJECT(x,deleted) \
    (deleted(x) \
        ? FALSE \
        : (InterlockedIncrement( \
            reinterpret_cast<LPLONG>(&(x)->ReferenceCount) \
            ), TRUE))
#define DEREFERENCE_OBJECT(x,cleanup) \
    (InterlockedDecrement(reinterpret_cast<LPLONG>(&(x)->ReferenceCount)) \
        ? TRUE \
        : (cleanup(x), FALSE))
#define NH_FREE(p)              HeapFree(GetProcessHeap(), 0, (p))

// net\ias\iasjet\setup\migratemdb.cpp
#define STRIP_BYTE(p,ul) {                \
   if (!IASIsDigit(*p)) goto error;          \
   ul = *p++ - _T('0');                   \
   if (IASIsDigit(*p)) {                     \
      ul *= 10; ul += *p++ - _T('0');     \
      if (IASIsDigit(*p)) {                  \
         ul *= 10; ul += *p++ - _T('0');  \
      }                                   \
   }                                      \
   if (ul > 0xff) goto error;             \
}

// net\ias\inc\iasapix.h
#define IAS_DECLARE_REGISTRY(coclass, ver, flags, tlb) \
static HRESULT WINAPI UpdateRegistry(BOOL bRegister) \
{ \
   return IASRegisterComponent(_Module.GetModuleInstance(), \
                               __uuidof(coclass), \
                               IASProgramName, \
                               L ## #coclass, \
                               flags, \
                               __uuidof(tlb), \
                               ver, \
                               0, \
                               bRegister); \
}

// net\ias\mmc\atl25\atlsnap.h
#define SNAPINMENUID(id) \
public: \
   static const UINT GetMenuID() \
   { \
      static const UINT IDMENU = id; \
      return id; \
   }
#define EXT_SNAPINMENUID(id) \
public: \
   static const UINT GetMenuID() \
   { \
      static const UINT IDMENU = id; \
      return id; \
   }
#define SNAPINCOMMAND_ENTRY(id, func) \
      if (id == nID) \
      { \
         hr = func(bHandled, pObj); \
         if (bHandled) \
            return hr; \
      }
#define SNAPINCOMMAND_RANGE_ENTRY(id1, id2, func) \
      if (id1 >= nID && nID <= id2) \
      { \
         hr = func(nID, bHandled, pObj); \
         if (bHandled) \
            return hr; \
      }

#define CATCH_AND_RETURN() \
catch (CException* e) { \
   HRESULT hr = COleException::Process(e); \
   e->ReportError(); \
   e->Delete(); \
   return hr; \
} \
catch (...) { \
   return E_FAIL; \
}
#define CATCH_AND_SAVE(hr) \
catch (CException* e) { \
   hr = COleException::Process(e); \
   e->ReportError(); \
   e->Delete(); \
} \
catch (...) { \
   hr = E_FAIL; \
}

#define RET_ON_ERROR(x) \
		if (FAILED(hr = x))\
			return hr;
#define BREAK_ON_ERROR(x) \

			break;

// net\ias\services\dictionary\datasource.cpp
#define WSTRING_PROPERTY(class, prop, member) \
STDMETHODIMP class ## ::put_ ## prop (LPCWSTR newVal) \
{ \
   _com_serialize               \
   delete[] member;             \
   member = ias_wcsdup(newVal); \
   return S_OK;                 \
} \
\
STDMETHODIMP class ## ::get_ ## prop (LPWSTR* pVal) \
{ \
   if (pVal == NULL) return E_POINTER; \
   _com_serialize                      \
   *pVal = com_wcsdup(member);         \
   return S_OK;                        \
}
#define CHECK_INIT(expr) \
if (FAILED(initStatus = expr)) return initStatus;

// net\ias\services\inc\iasutil.h
#define IAS_DEREF(obj) \
   if (obj) { (obj)->Release(); (obj) = NULL; }
#define RETURN_ERROR(expr) \
   { HRESULT __hr__ = (expr); if (FAILED(__hr__)) return __hr__; }
#define CATCH_AND_RETURN() \
   catch (const std::bad_alloc&) { return E_OUTOFMEMORY; } \
   catch (const _com_error& ce)  { return ce.Error(); }    \
   catch (...)                   { return E_FAIL; }

// net\ias\services\util\inet.c
#define STRIP_BYTE(p,ul) {                \
   if (!isdigit(*p)) goto error;          \
   ul = *p++ - _T('0');                   \
   if (isdigit(*p)) {                     \
      ul *= 10; ul += *p++ - _T('0');     \
      if (isdigit(*p)) {                  \
         ul *= 10; ul += *p++ - _T('0');  \
      }                                   \
   }                                      \
   if (ul > 0xff) goto error;             \
}
#define STRIP_WIDTH(p,ul) {                \
   if (!isdigit(*p)) goto error;          \
   ul = *p++ - _T('0');                   \
   if (isdigit(*p)) {                     \
      ul *= 10; ul += *p++ - _T('0');     \
   }                                      \
   if (ul > 32) goto error;             \
}

// net\inc\icmp6.h
#define ICMPv6_ERROR_TYPE(type)         (((type) & 0x80) == 0)

// net\inc\ipxfwtbl.h
#define ReleaseInterfaceReference(ifCB) (						\
	 (InterlockedDecrement (&ifCB->ICB_ReferenceCount)>=0) 		\
		? ifCB													\
		: (FreeInterface (ifCB), (ifCB = NULL))					\
)
#define InterfaceContextToReference(Context,NicId) (						\
	(InterlockedIncrement(&((PINTERFACE_CB)Context)->ICB_ReferenceCount)>0)	\
		? ((NicId==((PINTERFACE_CB)Context)->ICB_NicId)						\
			? (PINTERFACE_CB)Context										\
			: (ReleaseInterfaceReference(((PINTERFACE_CB)Context)), NULL))	\
		: NULL																\
	)
#define ReleaseRouteReference(fwRoute) {						\
	if (InterlockedDecrement (&fwRoute->FR_ReferenceCount)<0) {	\
		FreeRoute (fwRoute);									\
		fwRoute = NULL;											\
	}															\
}

// net\inc\isnipx.h
#define IpxFreeRequest(_Device,_Request) \
    ;
#define UNMARK_REQUEST_PENDING(_Request) \
    (((IoGetCurrentIrpStackLocation(_Request))->Control) &= ~SL_PENDING_RETURNED)
#define REQUEST_STATUS(_Request) \
    (_Request)->IoStatus.Status
#define REQUEST_INFORMATION(_Request) \
    (_Request)->IoStatus.Information
#define IPX_FREE_LOCK(_Lock, _LockHandle) \
	CTEFreeLock(_Lock, _LockHandle)

                TDI_SERVICE_FORCE_ACCESS_CHECK |        \
                TDI_SERVICE_CONNECTION_MODE |           \
                TDI_SERVICE_CONNECTIONLESS_MODE |       \
                TDI_SERVICE_MESSAGE_MODE |              \
                TDI_SERVICE_ERROR_FREE_DELIVERY |       \
                TDI_SERVICE_BROADCAST_SUPPORTED |       \
                TDI_SERVICE_MULTICAST_SUPPORTED |       \
                TDI_SERVICE_DELAYED_ACCEPTANCE  )

#define MIB_ACTION_CLEANUP     (ASN_PRIVATE|ASN_CONSTRUCTOR|0x02)

// net\inc\stropts.h
#define	I_CLOSE		(STR|32)

// net\inc\wzcsapi.h
#define RpcFree(pMem)       MIDL_user_free(pMem)

// net\ipsec\ipsecshr\precomp.h
#define BAIL_ON_WIN32_ERROR(dwError) \
    if (dwError) {                   \
        goto error;                  \
    }

// net\ipsec\pastore\structs.h
#define BAIL_ON_WIN32_ERROR(dwError) \
    if (dwError) {\
        goto error; \
    }

// net\ipsec\spd\client\precomp.h
#define BAIL_ON_WIN32_ERROR(dwError) \
    if (dwError) {                   \
        goto error;                  \
    }

// net\ipsec\spd\server\precomp.h
#define BAIL_ON_WIN32_ERROR(dwError)                \
    if (dwError) {                                  \
        goto error;                                 \
    }
#define BAIL_ON_LOCK_ERROR(dwError)                 \
    if (dwError) {                                  \
        goto lock;                                  \
    }
#define BAIL_ON_WIN32_SUCCESS(dwError) \
    if (!dwError) {                    \
        goto success;                  \
    }
#define BAIL_ON_LOCK_SUCCESS(dwError)  \
    if (!dwError) {                    \
        goto lock_success;             \
    }

// net\irda\inc\irerr.h
#define IRMAC_WRITE_FAILED                      (IR_ERROR_BASE+1)
#define IRMAC_READ_FAILED                       (IR_ERROR_BASE+2)
#define IRMAC_OPEN_PORT_FAILED                  (IR_ERROR_BASE+8)
#define IRMAC_SET_BAUD_FAILED                   (IR_ERROR_BASE+9)
#define IRMAC_MALLOC_FAILED                     (IR_ERROR_BASE+10)
#define IRLAP_MALLOC_FAILED                     (IRLAP_ERROR_BASE + 5)
#define IRLMP_TIMER_START_FAILED                (IRLMP_ERROR_BASE + 4)
#define IRLMP_ALLOC_FAILED                      (IRLMP_ERROR_BASE + 5)
#define IRLMP_SCHEDULE_EVENT_FAILED             (IRLMP_ERROR_BASE + 12)
#define IRLMP_TIMER_STOP_FAILED                 (IRLMP_ERROR_BASE + 22)

// net\irda\inc\irmem.h
#define IRDA_FREE_MEM(ptr)          ExFreePool((ptr))

// net\irda\irclass\irclass.c
#define MakeCase(d)  case d: return TEXT(#d)

// net\irda\irftp\irftp.cpp
#define LOAD_STRING(id, str)                                                     \
    if (0 == LoadString( g_hInstance, id, g_Strings.str, sizeof(g_Strings.str)/sizeof(wchar_t))) \
        {                                                                        \
        return FALSE;                                                            \
        }

// net\irda\irftp\utils.cpp
#define VALIDATE_SEND_COOKIE(cookie) \
    {   \
        __try   \
          { \
              *pStatus = ERROR_INVALID_DATA;    \
              if (MAGIC_ID != ((CSendProgress *)cookie)->m_dwMagicID)   \
                  return;   \
              *pStatus = ERROR_SUCCESS; \
          } \
        __except (EXCEPTION_EXECUTE_HANDLER) \
          {  \
              return;   \
          } \
    }

// net\irda\irtdicl\irtdicl.c
#define UNLOCKIT()  CTEFreeLock(&ClientLock, hLock)

// net\irda\irxfer\precomp.h
#define ExitOnErr( err )       { if( err ) goto lExit; }

// net\irda\irxfer\util.h
#define MemFree( lpv )        { LocalFree( lpv ); lpv = 0; }
#define ExitOnTrue( f )       if( f ) goto lExit;
#define ExitOnFalse( f )      if( !(f) ) goto lExit;
#define ExitOnNull( x )       if( (x) == NULL ) goto lExit;
#define ExitOnFail( hr )      if( FAILED(hr) ) goto lExit;
#define FailOnTrue( f )       if( f ) goto lErr;
#define FailOnFalse( f )      if( !(f) ) goto lErr;
#define FailOnNull( x )       if( (x) == NULL ) goto lErr;
#define FailOnFail( hr )      if( FAILED(hr) ) goto lErr;
#define GotoErrSet( cmd )     { cmd; goto lErr; }

#define UNMARK_IRP_PENDING(_Request) \
    (((IoGetCurrentIrpStackLocation(_Request))->Control) &= ~SL_PENDING_RETURNED)
#define FREE_CONN_LOCK(pConn,Handle)   CTEFreeLock(&(pConn)->Lock, Handle)
#define FREE_ADDR_LOCK(pAddr,Handle)   CTEFreeLock(&(pAddr)->Lock, Handle)

// net\jet500\jet\dae\inc\daedef.h
#define Call(func)					{if ((err = (func)) < 0) {goto HandleError;}}
#define CallR(func)					{if ((err = (func)) < 0) {return err;}}
#define CallJ( func, label )		{if ((err = (func)) < 0) goto label;}
#define Error( errToReturn, label )	{err = errToReturn; goto label;}
#define Call(func)			{if ((err = (func)) < 0) {goto HandleError;}}
#define CallR(func)			{if ((err = (func)) < 0) {return err;}}
#define CallJ(func,label)	{if ((err = (func)) < 0) {goto label;}}
#define Error(errT,label)	{err = (errT); goto label;}
#define	SemRelease( s )							0
#define	SignalClose( s )						0
#define	SgSemRelease( s )	  					0
#define	LgSemRelease( s )		  				0
#define	SemRelease( s )							UtilSemRelease( s )
#define	SignalClose( s )				   		UtilCloseSignal( s )
#define ReleaseCriticalSection( s )
#define	SgSemRelease( s )  						UtilSemRelease( s )
#define	LgSemRelease( s )	  					0
#define	SemRelease( s )							UtilSemRelease( s )
#define	SignalClose( s )						UtilCloseSignal( s )
#define	LgSemRelease( s )				  		SemRelease( s )

// net\jet500\jet\dae\inc\dbapi.h
#define ReleaseVDbid( vdbid )					{ MEMRelease( iresDAB, (BYTE *) vdbid ); vdbid = vdbidNil; }
#define ReleaseVDbid( vdbid )					{ MEMRelease( iresDAB, (BYTE *) vdbid ); }
#define ReleaseVDbid( vdbid )

// net\jet500\jet\dae\inc\dirapi.h
#define	fDIRDeleteItem			(1<<13)
#define	ErrDIRGetBookmark( pfucb, psrid )								\
	( PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->csrstat == csrstatOnCurNode ||			\
		PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->csrstat == csrstatDeferGotoBookmark ?	\
		( *psrid = PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->bm, JET_errSuccess ) :		\
		JET_errNoCurrentRecord )
#define DIRDeferGotoBookmark( pfucb, bmT )								\
	{																					\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->csrstat = csrstatDeferGotoBookmark;		\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->bm = bmT;											\
	( pfucb )->sridFather = sridNull;							\
	DIRSetRefresh( pfucb );														\
	}
#define DIRGotoBookmarkItem( pfucb, bmT, itemT )  						\
	{																					\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->csrstat = csrstatDeferGotoBookmark;		\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->bm = bmT;											\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->item = itemT;										\
	( pfucb )->sridFather = sridNull;									\
	DIRSetRefresh( pfucb );														\
	}
#define DIRGotoPgnoItag( pfucb, pgnoT, itagT )   						\
	{																					\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->csrstat = csrstatOnCurNode;					\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->bm = SridOfPgnoItag( (pgnoT), (itagT) );	\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pgno = (pgnoT);	 								\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itag = (itagT);	 								\
	( pfucb )->sridFather = sridNull;									\
	DIRSetRefresh( pfucb );														\
	}
#define DIRGotoFDPRoot( pfucb )									  		\
	{															  	 	\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->csrstat = csrstatOnFDPNode;					\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->bm =									  		\
		SridOfPgnoItag( PgnoFDPOfPfucb( pfucb ), itagFOP );				\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pgno = PgnoFDPOfPfucb( pfucb ); 				\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itag = itagFOP;								\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itagFather = itagFOP;							\
	( pfucb )->sridFather = sridNull;						\
	if ( !FReadAccessPage( pfucb, PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pgno ) )		\
		{															   	\
		if ( ErrSTReadAccessPage( pfucb,							   	\
			PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pgno ) < 0 )							\
			{														   	\
			DIRSetRefresh( pfucb );									   	\
			}															\
		else														   	\
			{														   	\
			NDGet( pfucb, PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itag );					\
			DIRSetFresh( pfucb );										\
			}															\
		}																\
	}
#define DIRGotoAVAILEXT( pfucb, pgnoT )		 							\
	{																	\
	DIRGotoPgnoItag( pfucb, pgnoT, itagAVAILEXT );  					\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itagFather = itagFOP;							\
	}
#define DIRGotoLongRoot( pfucb )										\
	{																	\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->csrstat = csrstatOnCurNode;					\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->bm =											\
		SridOfPgnoItag( PgnoFDPOfPfucb( pfucb ), itagLONG );			\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pgno = PgnoFDPOfPfucb( pfucb ); 				\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itag = itagLONG;								\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itagFather = itagNull;						\
	( pfucb )->sridFather = sridNull;									\
	if ( !FReadAccessPage( pfucb, PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pgno ) )		\
		{																\
		if ( ErrSTReadAccessPage( pfucb,								\
			PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pgno ) < 0 )							\
			{															\
			DIRSetRefresh( pfucb );										\
			}															\
		else															\
			{															\
			NDGet( pfucb, PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itag );					\
			DIRSetFresh( pfucb );										\
			}															\
		}																\
	}
#define DIRGotoDataRoot( pfucbX )	  							\
	{															\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucbX )->csrstat = csrstatOnDataRoot;			\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucbX )->bm = ( pfucbX )->u.pfcb->bmRoot;		\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucbX )->pgno = PgnoRootOfPfucb( pfucbX );	\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucbX )->itagFather = itagNull;				\
	( pfucbX )->sridFather = sridNull;				\
	DIRSetRefresh( pfucbX );									\
	}
#define	BTUp( pfucb )	FUCBFreeCSR( pfucb )
#define CbFreeDensity(pfucb) \
	( (pfucb)->u.pfcb != pfcbNil ? (pfucb)->u.pfcb->cbDensityFree : 0 )

// net\jet500\jet\dae\inc\fcb.h
#define fFCBDeletePending		(1<<9)		// is a delete pending on this table/index?
#define fFCBDomainOperation		(1<<10)		// is used to synchronize bm cleanup
#define FFCBDeletePending( pfcb )		  	( (pfcb)->wFlags & fFCBDeletePending )
#define FCBSetDeletePending( pfcb )	 	  	( (pfcb)->wFlags |= fFCBDeletePending )
#define FCBResetDeletePending( pfcb )	  	( (pfcb)->wFlags &= ~(fFCBDeletePending) )

// net\jet500\jet\dae\inc\fdb.h
#define ffieldDeleted		(1<<1)		// Fixed field has been deleted

// net\jet500\jet\dae\inc\fileint.h
#define RECFreeIDB(pidb) { MEMReleasePidb(pidb); }

// net\jet500\jet\dae\inc\fucb.h
#define	MEMReleasePcsr(pcsr)	{ MEMRelease(iresCSR, (BYTE*)(pcsr)); pcsr = pcsrNil; }
#define	MEMReleasePcsr(pcsr)	{ MEMRelease(iresCSR, (BYTE*)(pcsr)); }
#define fFUCBDeferClose						(1<<9)	//	FUCB is awaiting close
#define fFUCBDeferGotoBookmark				(1<<10)	//	clustered cursor position
#define FFUCBDeferClosed( pfucb )			( (pfucb)->wFlags & fFUCBDeferClose )
#define FUCBSetDeferClose( pfucb )			( (pfucb)->wFlags |= fFUCBDeferClose )
#define FUCBResetDeferClose( pfucb ) 		( (pfucb)->wFlags &= ~(fFUCBDeferClose) )
#define	FFUCBDeferGotoBookmark( pfucb )					\
	( (pfucb)->wFlags & fFUCBDeferGotoBookmark )
#define	FUCBSetDeferGotoBookmark( pfucb )				\
	( (pfucb)->wFlags |= fFUCBDeferGotoBookmark )
#define	FUCBResetDeferGotoBookmark( pfucb )				\
	( (pfucb)->wFlags &= ~(fFUCBDeferGotoBookmark) )
#define MEMReleasePfucb(pfucb)		{ MEMRelease(iresFUCB, (BYTE*)(pfucb)); pfucb = pfucbNil; }
#define MEMReleasePfucb(pfucb)		{ MEMRelease(iresFUCB, (BYTE*)(pfucb)); }

// net\jet500\jet\dae\inc\idb.h
#define MEMReleasePidb(pidb)	{ MEMRelease(iresIDB, (BYTE*)(pidb)); pidb = pidbNil; }
#define MEMReleasePidb(pidb)	{ MEMRelease(iresIDB, (BYTE*)(pidb)); }

// net\jet500\jet\dae\inc\node.h
#define	FNDDeleted(b)	 		( (b) & fNDDeleted )
#define	FNDVerDel(b)			( (b) & (fNDDeleted | fNDVersion) )
#define	NDSetDeleted(b) 	   	( (b) |= fNDDeleted )
#define	NDResetDeleted(b)	   	( (b) &= ~fNDDeleted )
#define FNDItemDelete( item ) 		( (item) & fNDItemDelete )
#define ITEMSetDelete( item )			( (item) |= fNDItemDelete )
#define ITEMResetDelete( item )		( (item) &= ~(fNDItemDelete) )
#define BmNDOfItem( item )				((item) & ~( fNDItemVersion | fNDItemDelete ) )

// net\jet500\jet\dae\inc\nver.h
#define MEMReleasePbucket(pbucket)		{ MEMRelease( iresVersionBucket, (BYTE*)(pbucket) ); pbucket = pbucketNil; }
#define MEMReleasePbucket(pbucket)		{ MEMRelease( iresVersionBucket, (BYTE*)(pbucket) ); }
#define ErrVERDeferFreeFDP( pfucb, pgno ) 		ErrVERFlag( pfucb, operDeferFreeFDP, &pgno, siozeof(pgno) )
#define	FVERPotThere( vs, fDelete )						  		\
	( ( (vs) != vsUncommittedByOther && !(fDelete) ) ||	  		\
		(vs) == vsUncommittedByOther )

// net\jet500\jet\dae\inc\page.h
#define ibCbFreeTotal	( (INT) (ULONG_PTR)&((PAGE *)0)->pghdr.cbFreeTotal )
#define CbLastFreeSpace(ppage)										\
	((ppage)->pghdr.ibLastUsed											\
		- sizeof(PGHDR)													\
		- sizeof(TAG) * (ppage)->pghdr.ctagMac)
#define CbPMFreeSpace( pssib )	( CheckSSIB(pssib),							\
	((INT)(pssib)->pbf->ppage->pghdr.cbFreeTotal) )
#define CbPMFreeSpace( pssib )	( (INT)(pssib)->pbf->ppage->pghdr.cbFreeTotal )
#define	ErrPMCheckFreeSpace( pssib, cbT )								   	\
		( ((INT)(pssib)->pbf->ppage->pghdr.cbFreeTotal) < cbT ?				\
			errPMOutOfPageSpace : JET_errSuccess )

// net\jet500\jet\dae\inc\pib.h
#define MEMReleasePpib(ppib)	{ MEMRelease(iresPIB, (BYTE*)(ppib)); ppib = ppibNil; }
#define MEMReleasePpib(ppib)	{ MEMRelease(iresPIB, (BYTE*)(ppib)); }
#define	FPIBDeferFreeNodeSpace( ppib )			( (ppib)->fDeferFreeNodeSpace )
#define	PIBSetDeferFreeNodeSpace( ppib )		( (ppib)->fDeferFreeNodeSpace = fTrue )
#define	PIBResetDeferFreeNodeSpace( ppib )		( (ppib)->fDeferFreeNodeSpace = fFalse )

// net\jet500\jet\dae\inc\scb.h
#define MEMReleasePscb(pscb)	{ MEMRelease(iresSCB, (BYTE*)(pscb)); pscb = pscbNil; }
#define MEMReleasePscb(pscb)	{ MEMRelease(iresSCB, (BYTE*)(pscb)); }

// net\jet500\jet\dae\inc\stapi.h
#define MEMReleasePbgcb(pbgcb)	{ MEMRelease(iresBGCB, (BYTE*)(pbgcb)); pbgcb = pbgcbNil; }
#define MEMReleasePbgcb(pbgcb)	{ MEMRelease(iresBGCB, (BYTE*)(pbgcb)); }
#define BFSFree( pbf )						\
	{												\
	SgSemRequest( semST );					\
	BFFree( pbf );								\
	SgSemRelease( semST );					\
	}

// net\jet500\jet\dae\inc\sys.h
#define ErrSysCloseFile( hf ) ErrSysCloseHandle( hf )

// net\jet500\jet\dae\inc\systab.h
#define CheckTableObject( szTable )					\
	{															\
	ERR			err;										\
	OBJID		objid;										\
	JET_OBJTYP	objtyp; 									\
																\
	err = ErrFindObjidFromIdName( ppib,				\
		dbid,													\
		objidTblContainer,								\
		szTable,												\
		&objid, 												\
		&objtyp );											\
	if ( err >= JET_errSuccess )				  		\
		{														\
		if ( objtyp == JET_objtypQuery )				\
			return JET_errQueryNotSupported;			\
		if ( objtyp == JET_objtypLink ) 				\
			return JET_errLinkNotSupported; 			\
		if ( objtyp == JET_objtypSQLLink )			\
			return JET_errSQLLinkNotSupported;		\
		}														\
	else														\
		return err;											\
	}

// net\jet500\jet\dae\src\dir.c
#define	DIRIPurgeParent( pfucb )												\
	FUCBFreePath( &(PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pcsrPath), pcsrNil );
#define	DIRIUpToCSR( pfucb, pcsr )												\
	{																						\
	FUCBFreePath( &PcsrCurrent( pfucb ), pcsr );								\
	if ( FReadAccessPage( pfucb, pcsr->pgno ) )								\
		{																					\
		NDGet( pfucb, pcsr->itag );	  											\
		}																					\
	}

// net\jet500\jet\dae\src\node.c
#define	NDLGCheckPage( pfucb )						  	 	\
	{			 										   	\
	(VOID)ErrLGCheckPage( pfucb,						   	\
		pfucb->ssib.pbf->ppage->pghdr.cbFreeTotal,		   	\
		(SHORT)ItagPMQueryNextItag( &pfucb->ssib ) );    	\
	}

// net\jet500\jet\dae\src\ver.c
#define IbFreeInNewBucket(pbucket)                                                      \
	IbAlignRCE( cbBucketHeader )
#define IbFreeInBucket(pbucket)										\
	( FBucketNew(pbucket) ? IbFreeInNewBucket(pbucket)				\
		: IbAlignRCE(												\
			(pbucket)->ibNewestRCE                                  \
			+ sizeof(RCE)											\
			+ (PrceNewestRCE(pbucket)) ->cbData ) )
#define CbFreeInBucket(pbucket)										\
	( ( (pbucket == pbucketNil) ?									\
		0 : ((INT) sizeof(BUCKET) - (INT) IbFreeInBucket(pbucket) ) ) )

// net\jet500\jet\jet\compact\test.h
#define Call( fn )	{ if ( ( err = fn ) < 0  ) goto HandleError; }

// net\jet500\jet\jet\inc\_jet.h
#define UtilReleaseCriticalSection( pv )	0
#define SFree( pv )		{ OSSFree( pv ); pv = 0; }
#define LFree( pv )		{ OSLFree( pv ); pv = 0; }
#define	SFree( __pv_ )		free( __pv_ )
#define	LFree( __pv_ )			free( __pv_ )
#define APIInitEnter()					{							\
	if (critJet == NULL)	{										\
		ERR errT = ErrUtilInitializeCriticalSection( &critJet );	\
		if ( errT < 0 )												\
			return errT;	}										\
	UtilEnterCriticalSection(critJet);	}

#define callr( func )			{if ( ( err = ( func ) ) < 0 ) return err;}
#define callh( func, label )	{if ( ( err = ( func ) ) < 0 ) goto label;}

// net\jet500\xjet\inc\_edbutil.h
#define CallJ( func, label )	{if ((err = (func)) < 0) {goto label;}}

// net\jet500\xjet\inc\_jet.h
#define Call(func)					{if ((err = (func)) < 0) {goto HandleError;}}
#define CallR(func)					{if ((err = (func)) < 0) {return err;}}
#define CallJ( func, label )		{if ((err = (func)) < 0) goto label;}
#define Error( errRet, label )		{err = errRet; goto label;}

// net\jet500\xjet\inc\cat.h
#define CheckTableObject( szTable )						\
	{													\
	ERR			err;									\
	OBJID		objid;									\
	JET_OBJTYP	objtyp; 								\
														\
	err = ErrFindObjidFromIdName( ppib,					\
		dbid,											\
		objidTblContainer,								\
		szTable,										\
		&objid, 										\
		&objtyp );										\
	if ( err >= JET_errSuccess )				  		\
		{												\
		if ( objtyp == JET_objtypQuery )				\
			return ErrERRCheck( JET_errQueryNotSupported );	\
		if ( objtyp == JET_objtypLink ) 				\
			return ErrERRCheck( JET_errLinkNotSupported ); 	\
		if ( objtyp == JET_objtypSQLLink )				\
			return ErrERRCheck( JET_errSQLLinkNotSupported );	\
		}												\
	else												\
		return err;										\
	}

#define	SignalClose( s )				   		UtilCloseSignal( s )
#define ReleaseCriticalSection( s )				0
#define	SignalClose( s )						UtilCloseSignal( s )

// net\jet500\xjet\inc\dbapi.h
#define ReleaseVDbid( vdbid )					{ MEMRelease( iresDAB, (BYTE *) vdbid ); vdbid = vdbidNil; }
#define ReleaseVDbid( vdbid )					{ MEMRelease( iresDAB, (BYTE *) vdbid ); }
#define ReleaseVDbid( vdbid )

// net\jet500\xjet\inc\dirapi.h
#define	fDIRDeleteItem			(1<<13)
#define	ErrDIRGetBookmark( pfucb, psrid )								\
	( PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->csrstat == csrstatOnCurNode ||				\
		PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->csrstat == csrstatDeferGotoBookmark ?		\
		( *psrid = PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->bm, JET_errSuccess ) :			\
		ErrERRCheck( JET_errNoCurrentRecord ) )
#define DIRDeferGotoBookmark( pfucb, bmT )								\
	{																	\
	FUCBResetPreread( pfucb );											\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->csrstat = csrstatDeferGotoBookmark;			\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->bm = bmT;										\
	( pfucb )->sridFather = sridNull;									\
	DIRSetRefresh( pfucb );														\
	}
#define DIRDeferGotoBookmark( pfucb, bmT )								\
	{																	\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->csrstat = csrstatDeferGotoBookmark;			\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->bm = bmT;										\
	( pfucb )->sridFather = sridNull;									\
	DIRSetRefresh( pfucb );														\
	}
#define DIRGotoBookmarkItem( pfucb, bmT, itemT )  						\
	{																	\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->csrstat = csrstatDeferGotoBookmark;			\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->bm = bmT;						  				\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->item = itemT;				  					\
	( pfucb )->sridFather = sridNull;									\
	DIRSetRefresh( pfucb );												\
	}
#define DIRGotoPgnoItag( pfucb, pgnoT, itagT )   						\
	{																	\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->csrstat = csrstatOnCurNode;					\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->bm = SridOfPgnoItag( (pgnoT), (itagT) );		\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pgno = (pgnoT);	 							\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itag = (itagT);	 							\
	( pfucb )->sridFather = sridNull;									\
	DIRSetRefresh( pfucb );														\
	}
#define DIRGotoFDPRoot( pfucb )									  		\
	{															  	 	\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->csrstat = csrstatOnFDPNode;					\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->bm =									  		\
		SridOfPgnoItag( PgnoFDPOfPfucb( pfucb ), itagFOP );				\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pgno = PgnoFDPOfPfucb( pfucb ); 				\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itag = itagFOP;								\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itagFather = itagFOP;							\
	( pfucb )->sridFather = sridNull;									\
	if ( !FBFReadAccessPage( pfucb, PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pgno ) )		\
		{															   	\
		if ( ErrBFReadAccessPage( pfucb,							   	\
			PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pgno ) < 0 )							\
			{														   	\
			DIRSetRefresh( pfucb );									   	\
			}															\
		else														   	\
			{														   	\
			NDGet( pfucb, PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itag );					\
			DIRSetFresh( pfucb );										\
			}															\
		}																\
	}
#define DIRGotoAVAILEXT( pfucb, pgnoT )		 							\
	{																	\
	DIRGotoPgnoItag( pfucb, pgnoT, itagAVAILEXT );  					\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itagFather = itagFOP;							\
	}
#define DIRGotoLongRoot( pfucb )										\
	{																	\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->csrstat = csrstatOnCurNode;					\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->bm =											\
		SridOfPgnoItag( PgnoFDPOfPfucb( pfucb ), itagLONG );			\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pgno = PgnoFDPOfPfucb( pfucb ); 				\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itag = itagLONG;								\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itagFather = itagNull;						\
	( pfucb )->sridFather = sridNull;									\
	if ( !FBFReadAccessPage( pfucb, PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pgno ) )		\
		{																\
		if ( ErrBFReadAccessPage( pfucb,								\
			PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pgno ) < 0 )							\
			{															\
			DIRSetRefresh( pfucb );										\
			}															\
		else															\
			{															\
			NDGet( pfucb, PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itag );					\
			DIRSetFresh( pfucb );										\
			}															\
		}																\
	}
#define DIRGotoDataRoot( pfucb )										\
	{																	\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->csrstat = csrstatOnCurNode;					\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->bm =											\
		SridOfPgnoItag( PgnoFDPOfPfucb( pfucb ), itagDATA );			\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pgno = PgnoFDPOfPfucb( pfucb ); 				\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itag = itagDATA;								\
	PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itagFather = itagNull;						\
	( pfucb )->sridFather = sridNull;									\
	if ( !FBFReadAccessPage( pfucb, PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pgno ) )		\
		{																\
		if ( ErrBFReadAccessPage( pfucb,								\
			PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pgno ) < 0 )							\
			{															\
			DIRSetRefresh( pfucb );										\
			}															\
		else															\
			{															\
			NDGet( pfucb, PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->itag );					\
			DIRSetFresh( pfucb );										\
			}															\
		}																\
	}
#define ErrDIRDeleteDirectory( pfucb, pgnoFDP )		ErrSPFreeFDP( pfucb, pgnoFDP )
#define	BTUp( pfucb )	FUCBFreeCSR( pfucb )
#define CbFreeDensity(pfucb) \
	( (pfucb)->u.pfcb != pfcbNil ? (INT)(pfucb)->u.pfcb->cbDensityFree : 0 )

#define FUCBResetDeferClose( pfucb ) 		( (pfucb)->fDeferClose = 0 )

	( (pfucb)->fDeferGotoBookmark )
#define	FUCBSetDeferGotoBookmark( pfucb )				\

#define	FUCBResetDeferGotoBookmark( pfucb )				\
	( (pfucb)->fDeferGotoBookmark = 0 )

// net\jet500\xjet\inc\node.h
#define	FNDDeleted(b)	 		( (b) & fNDDeleted )
#define	FNDVerDel(b)			( (b) & (fNDDeleted | fNDVersion) )
#define	NDSetDeleted(b) 	   	( (b) |= fNDDeleted )
#define	NDResetDeleted(b)	   	( (b) &= ~fNDDeleted )
#define FNDItemDelete( item ) 		( (item) & fNDItemDelete )
#define ITEMSetDelete( item )			( (item) |= fNDItemDelete )
#define ITEMResetDelete( item )		( (item) &= ~(fNDItemDelete) )
#define BmNDOfItem( item )				((item) & ~( fNDItemVersion | fNDItemDelete ) )
#define FNDFreePageSpace( pssib, cbT )							\
		( ((INT)(pssib)->pbf->ppage->cbFree) < cbT ?		\
		fFalse :												\
		FVERCheckUncommittedFreedSpace( (pssib)->pbf, cbT ) )

// net\jet500\xjet\inc\nver.h
#define	FVERPotThere( vs, fDelete )						  		\
	( ( (vs) != vsUncommittedByOther && !(fDelete) ) ||	  		\
		(vs) == vsUncommittedByOther )

// net\jet500\xjet\inc\page.h
#define ibCbFreeTotal	( (INT) (ULONG_PTR)&((PAGE *)0)->cbFree )
#define CbLastFreeSpace(ppage)							 		\
	( (ppage)->ibMic								 		\
		- sizeof(PGHDR)									 		\
		- ( sizeof(TAG) * (ppage)->ctagMac ) )
#define CbPMFreeSpace( pssib )	( CheckSSIB(pssib),				\
	((INT)( (pssib)->pbf->ppage->cbFree - (pssib)->pbf->ppage->cbUncommittedFreed ) ) )
#define CbPMFreeSpace( pssib )									\
	((INT)( (pssib)->pbf->ppage->cbFree - (pssib)->pbf->ppage->cbUncommittedFreed ) )

// net\jet500\xjet\src\dir.c
#define	DIRIPurgeParent( pfucb )												\
	FUCBFreePath( &(PcsrCurrent( pfucb )->pcsrPath), pcsrNil );
#define	DIRIUpToCSR( pfucb, pcsr )												\
	{																						\
	FUCBFreePath( &PcsrCurrent( pfucb ), pcsr );								\
	if ( FBFReadAccessPage( pfucb, pcsr->pgno ) )								\
		{																					\
		NDGet( pfucb, pcsr->itag );	  											\
		}																					\
	}

// net\jet500\xjet\src\node.c
#define	NDLGCheckPage( pfucb )						  	 	\
	{			 										   	\
	(VOID)ErrLGCheckPage( pfucb,						   	\
		pfucb->ssib.pbf->ppage->cbFree,			   	\
		pfucb->ssib.pbf->ppage->cbUncommittedFreed,  	\
		(SHORT)ItagPMQueryNextItag( &pfucb->ssib ),			\
		(PGNO) pfucb->ssib.pbf->ppage->pgnoFDP );    	\
	}

// net\jet500\xjet\src\sortapi.c
#define	fCOLSDELETEDFixedVar	(1<<0)
#define fCOLSDELETEDTagged		(1<<1)
#define FCOLSDELETEDFixedVar( fColumnsDeleted )		( (fColumnsDeleted) & fCOLSDELETEDFixedVar )
#define FCOLSDELETEDTagged( fColumnsDeleted )		( (fColumnsDeleted) & fCOLSDELETEDTagged )
#define FCOLSDELETEDSetFixedVar( fColumnsDeleted )	( (fColumnsDeleted) |= fCOLSDELETEDFixedVar )
#define FCOLSDELETEDSetTagged( fColumnsDeleted )	( (fColumnsDeleted) |= fCOLSDELETEDTagged )

// net\jet500\xjet\src\ver.c
#define IbBUFree(pbucket)											\
	( FBUNew(pbucket) ? IbAlignRCE( cbBucketHeader )				\
		: IbAlignRCE(												\
			(pbucket)->ibNewestRCE                                  \
			+ sizeof(RCE)											\
			+ (PrceRCENewest(pbucket))->cbData ) )
#define CbBUFree(pbucket)											\
	( ( (pbucket == pbucketNil) ?									\
		0 : ((INT) sizeof(BUCKET) - (INT) IbBUFree(pbucket) ) ) )
#define FVERRollback( prce )									\
	( ( prce->oper != operDeleteTable							\
		&& prce->oper != operDeferFreeExt )						\
	|| prce->pfcb->dbid != dbidTemp )

// net\layer2svc\crypt\src\tls1key.c
#define SafeAllocaFreeWZC(pData) \
{ \
    LocalFree (pData); \
}

// net\layer2svc\eapol\service\elport.h
#define EAPOL_PORT_DELETED(i) \
    ((i)->dwFlags & EAPOL_PORT_FLAG_DELETED)
#define EAPOL_REFERENCE_PORT(PCB) \
    (EAPOL_PORT_DELETED(PCB) ? FALSE : (InterlockedIncrement(&(PCB)->dwRefCount), TRUE))
#define EAPOL_DEREFERENCE_PORT(PCB) \
    (InterlockedDecrement(&(PCB)->dwRefCount) ? TRUE : (ElCleanupPort(PCB), FALSE))

// net\layer2svc\eapol\service\elsync.h
#define RELEASE_READ_LOCK(pRWL)                                 \
{                                                               \
    ReleaseReadLock(pRWL);                                      \
}
#define RELEASE_WRITE_LOCK(pRWL)                                \
{                                                               \
    ReleaseWriteLock(pRWL);                                     \
}
#define DELETE_LOCKED_LIST(pLL, FreeFunction)                       \
{                                                                   \
     (pLL)->created = 0;                                            \
     FreeList(&((pLL)->head), FreeFunction);                        \
     DeleteCriticalSection(&(pLL)->lock);                           \
}
#define ReleaseListLock(pLL)    LeaveCriticalSection(&(pLL)->lock)
#define DELETE_LOCKED_QUEUE(pLQ, FreeFunction)                      \
     DELETE_LOCKED_LIST(pLQ, FreeFunction)
#define DYNAMIC_LOCKS_STORE_INITIALIZED(pStore)                     \
    (LOCKED_LIST_INITIALIZED(&(pStore)->llFreeLocksList))

// net\layer2svc\monitor\database\precomp.h
#define BAIL_ON_WIN32_ERROR(dwError)    \
    if (dwError) {                      \
        goto error;                     \
    }
#define BAIL_ON_LOCK_ERROR(dwError)     \
    if (dwError) {                      \
        goto lock;                      \
    }

// net\layer2svc\wastore\structs.h
#define BAIL_ON_WIN32_ERROR(dwError) \
    if (dwError) {\
    goto error; \
    }
#define BAIL_ON_HRESULT_ERROR(hr) \
    if (FAILED(hr)) {\
    goto error; \
    }
#define BAIL_ON_WMI_ERROR_WITH_WIN32(hr, dwError) \
{ \
    dwError = Win32FromWmiHresult(hr); \
    if (dwError) {  \
    goto error; \
    } \
}

// net\layer2svc\wlpolicy\precomp.h
#define BAIL_ON_WIN32_ERROR(dwError)                \
    if (dwError) {                                  \
        goto error;                                 \
    }
#define BAIL_ON_LOCK_ERROR(dwError)                 \
    if (dwError) {                                  \
        goto lock;                                  \
    }
#define BAIL_ON_WIN32_SUCCESS(dwError) \
    if (!dwError) {                    \
        goto success;                  \
    }
#define BAIL_ON_LOCK_SUCCESS(dwError)  \
    if (!dwError) {                    \
        goto lock_success;             \
    }

// net\layer2svc\wlsnp\snputils.h
#define CORg(hResult) \
    do\
{\
    hr = (hResult);\
    if (FHrFailed(hr))\
{\
    goto Error;\
}\
}\
while (FALSE)
#define CWRg(hResult) \
    do\
{\
    hr = (DWORD) hResult;\
    hr = HRESULT_FROM_WIN32(hr);\
    if (FHrFailed(hr))\
{\
    goto Error;\
}\
}\
while (FALSE)

#define BAIL_ON_WIN32_ERROR(dwError) \
    if (dwError) {\
    goto error; \
    }

    if (pObject)               \
{                          \
    delete(pObject);        \
    pObject=NULL;        \
}

    ExReleaseResourceLite(_Resource);           \
    KeLeaveCriticalRegion();

    ExReleaseSpinLock (&(_Struct)->LockInfo.SpinLock, _OldIrqLevel);                     \

    ExReleaseSpinLockFromDpcLevel (&(_Struct)->LockInfo.SpinLock);                     \

// net\mmc\tfscore\errutil.h
#define CORg(hResult) \
	do\
		{\
		hr = (hResult);\
		if (FHrFailed(hr))\
		  {\
			AddSystemErrorMessage(hr);\
			goto Error;\
		  }\
		}\
	while (FALSE)
#define CWRg(hResult) \
	do\
		{\
		hr = (DWORD) hResult;\
		hr = HRESULT_FROM_WIN32(hr);\
		if (FHrFailed(hr))\
		  {\
			AddSystemErrorMessage(hr);\
			goto Error;\
		  }\
		}\
	while (FALSE)
#define	CORg_s(hResult, ids)\
	do\
		{\
		hr = (hResult);\
		if (FHrFailed(hr))\
			{\
			AddStringIdErrorMessage(hr);\
			goto Error;\
			}\
		}\
	while (FALSE)
#define	CORg_sz(hResult, sz)\
	do\
		{\
		hr = (hResult);\
		if (FHrFailed(hr))\
			{\
			AddStringErrorMessage(hr);\
			goto Error;\
			}\
		}\
	while (FALSE)

    STDMETHOD_(ULONG,AddRef) (THIS)  IPURE; \
    STDMETHOD_(ULONG,Release) (THIS) IPURE;	\

                            LPSTGMEDIUM pmedium ) IPURE;\
    STDMETHOD(GetDataHere) (THIS_ LPFORMATETC pformatetc,\
                            LPSTGMEDIUM pmedium ) IPURE;\
    STDMETHOD(QueryGetData) (THIS_ LPFORMATETC pformatetc ) IPURE;\
    STDMETHOD(GetCanonicalFormatEtc) (THIS_ LPFORMATETC pformatetc,\
                            LPFORMATETC pformatetcOut) IPURE;\
    STDMETHOD(SetData) (THIS_ LPFORMATETC pformatetc, STGMEDIUM FAR * pmedium,\
                            BOOL fRelease) IPURE;\
    STDMETHOD(EnumFormatEtc) (THIS_ DWORD dwDirection,\
                            LPENUMFORMATETC FAR* ppenumFormatEtc) IPURE;\
    STDMETHOD(DAdvise) (THIS_ FORMATETC FAR* pFormatetc, DWORD advf, \
                    LPADVISESINK pAdvSink, DWORD FAR* pdwConnection) IPURE;\
    STDMETHOD(DUnadvise) (THIS_ DWORD dwConnection) IPURE;\
    STDMETHOD(EnumDAdvise) (THIS_ LPENUMSTATDATA FAR* ppenumAdvise) IPURE;\
#define DeclareIAdviseSinkMembers(IPURE) \

			STGMEDIUM FAR* pmedium) IPURE; \
	STDMETHOD_(void,OnViewChange) (THIS_ DWORD dwAspect, \
			LONG lindex) IPURE; \
	STDMETHOD_(void,OnRename) (THIS_ LPMONIKER pmk) IPURE; \
	STDMETHOD_(void,OnSave) (THIS) IPURE; \
	STDMETHOD_(void,OnClose) (THIS) IPURE; \
#define DeclareIOleControlMembers(IPURE) \
	STDMETHOD(GetControlInfo)(THIS_ LPCONTROLINFO pCL) IPURE; \
	STDMETHOD(OnMnemonic)(THIS_ LPMSG pMsg) IPURE; \
	STDMETHOD(OnAmbientPropertyChange)(THIS_ DISPID dispid) IPURE; \
	STDMETHOD(FreezeEvents)(THIS_ BOOL fFreeze) IPURE; \
#define DeclareIExternalConnectionMembers(IPURE) \
    STDMETHOD_(DWORD,AddConnection) (THIS_ DWORD, DWORD)  IPURE; \
    STDMETHOD_(DWORD,ReleaseConnection) (THIS_ DWORD, DWORD, BOOL) IPURE;	\
#define DeclareIMAPIViewAdviseSinkMembers(IPURE) \

	STDMETHOD(OnNewMessage)(THIS) IPURE; \
	STDMETHOD(OnPrint)(THIS_ ULONG dwPageNumber, HRESULT hrStatus) IPURE; \
	STDMETHOD(OnSubmitted)(THIS) IPURE; \
	STDMETHOD(OnSaved)(THIS) IPURE; \

// net\mmc\tfscore\std.h
#define hrOK		HRESULT(0)
#define hrTrue		HRESULT(0)
#define DeclareSP(TAG,Type)  DeclareSmartPointer(SP##TAG,Type,delete m_p)
#define DeclareSRG(TAG,Type) DeclareSmartPointer(SRG##TAG,Type,delete [] m_p)
#define DeclareSPT(TAG,Type) DeclareSmartPointer(SPT##TAG,Type,TMemFree(m_p))
#define DeclareSPM(TAG,Type) DeclareSmartPointer(SPM##TAG,Type,MMemFree(m_p))
#define DeclareSPBasic(TAG,Type)\
	DeclareSPPrivateBasic(SP##TAG,Type, delete m_p)
#define DeclareSRGBasic(TAG,Type)\
	DeclareSPPrivateBasic(SRG##TAG,Type, delete [] m_p)
#define DeclareSPTBasic(TAG,Type)\
	DeclareSPPrivateBasic(SPT##TAG,Type,TMemFree(m_p))
#define DeclareSPMBasic(TAG,Type)\
	DeclareSPPrivateBasic(SPM##TAG,Type,MMemFree(m_p))
#define DeclareSPBasicEx(klass, Type, free, klassEx, klassFree)\
	DeclareSPPrivateCore(klass, Type, free)\
public:\
	klass(klassEx *pex) \
		{\
			m_p = 0; m_pex=pex; } \
	void klassFree() \
		{ Free(); } \
private:\
	klassEx	*m_pex; \
};
#define DeclareSmartPointer(klass, Type, free)\
	DeclareSPPrivateCore(klass, Type, free)\
public:\
	Type * operator->() const	{ return m_p; }\
};
#define ImplementEmbeddedUnknown(embeddor, interface) \
    STDMETHODIMP embeddor::E##interface::QueryInterface(REFIID iid,void **ppv)\
		{ \
		return EmbeddorOf(embeddor,m_##interface,this)->QueryInterface(iid,ppv);\
		} \
	STDMETHODIMP_(ULONG) embeddor::E##interface::AddRef() \
		{ \
		return EmbeddorOf(embeddor, m_##interface, this)->AddRef(); \
		} \
	STDMETHODIMP_(ULONG) embeddor::E##interface::Release() \
		{ \
		return EmbeddorOf(embeddor, m_##interface, this)->Release(); \
		}
#define ImplementEmbeddedUnknownNoRefCount(embeddor, interface) \
    STDMETHODIMP embeddor::E##interface::QueryInterface(REFIID iid,void **ppv)\
		{ \
		return EmbeddorOf(embeddor,m_##interface,this)->QueryInterface(iid,ppv);\
		}
